chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمُحْرِمِ يُقَبِّلُ امْرَأَتَهُ وَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهَا بِشَهْوَةٍ أَوْ غَيْرِ شَهْوَةٍ أَوْ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى غَيْرِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 104 – The one in Ihraam kisses his wife and he looks at her with desire, or without desire, or he looks at someone else

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/355)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/355)
text: قُلْتُ لَهُ مَا تَقُولُ فِي مُحْرِمٍ عَبِثَ بِذَكَرِهِ فَأَمْنَى قَالَ أَرَى عَلَيْهِ مِثْلَ مَا عَلَى مَنْ أَتَى أَهْلَهُ وَ هُوَ مُحْرِمٌ بَدَنَةً وَ الْحَجَّ مِنْ قَابِلٍ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Amro Bin Usman Al Khazzaz, from Sabbah Al Haza’a, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassanasws, said, ‘I said to himasws, ‘What are youasws saying regarding the one in Ihraam who tampers with his manhood, so he discharges?’ Heasws said: ‘Iasws upon him to be similar to what is upon the one who goes to his wife and he is in Ihraam – a sacrificial animal, and the Hajj (to be performed) the next year’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Amr ibn ‘Uthman al-Khazzaz from Sabah al-Hadhdha’ from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who is in the state of Ihram, plays with his penis and discharges semen. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is like one who, while in the state of Ihram, performs sexual intercourse with his wife; he owes badanah and al-Hajj in future.’”
